overview: A complete fitness companion that combines a realistic 3D interactive muscle viewer with a comprehensive training guide. Every major muscle group has illustrated step-by-step exercises, training frequency instructions, nutrition macros, and recovery methods — all in one app.
features: Interactive 3D human body model with 30+ selectable muscles
Step-by-step exercise illustrations with inline SVG figures for every muscle group
Nutrition and macro guide with muscle-specific food recommendations
Fast recovery methods including stretching, foam rolling, and contrast therapy
Tab navigation between 3D viewer and Training Guide
